description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a robust, padded headband and large, cushioned ear cups. The headband is covered in a matte black material, likely synthetic leather or rubber, providing comfort and durability. The ear cups are connected to the headband with metal hinges and feature a closed-back design for noise isolation. The exterior of the ear cups is smooth and features a visible brand logo, suggesting a premium audio product. The headphones appear foldable, with joints allowing the ear cups to rotate inward for compact storage. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for both casual and professional urban use.
description: A pair of black over-ear headphones with a padded headband, large cushioned ear cups, and a sleek, foldable design.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the padded headband arch and both ear cups angled inward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the headband and the brand logo on the ear cup.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view displaying the ear cups' closed-back design and the connecting hinges.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other ear cup and the headband's curvature.
